title: Gohad Fort
tagline: Gohad Fort — heritage city of Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: Gohad Fort (Hindi: गोहद क़िला Gohad Qila) is situated at Gohad city in Bhind district of Madhya Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Gohad Fort (Hindi: गोहद क़िला Gohad Qila) is situated at Gohad city in Bhind district of Madhya Pradesh, India. The town is situated at a distance of 45 km from Gwalior. The fort was built in 1505 by Singhandev II of Gohad State.

topPlaces.name: Gohad
topPlaces.description: Gohad is a city and municipality in Bhind district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. A town of historical importance, it is situated close to the city of Gwalior (45 km).

topPlaces.name: Jaitpura Kalan
topPlaces.description: Jaitpur Kalan is a block in Bah tehsil of Agra district in Uttar Pradesh, India. Jaitpur kalan was founded by Maharaja Mahendra Jait Singh Bhadauria (1427-1464) of Bhadawar.

items.note: Gohad is a city and municipality in Bhind district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. A town of historical importance, it is situated close to the city of Gwalior (45 km).
Jaitpur Kalan is a block in Bah tehsil of Agra district in Uttar Pradesh, India. Jaitpur kalan was founded by Maharaja Mahendra Jait Singh Bhadauria (1427-1464) of Bhadawar.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gohad Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gohad Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gohad Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Gwalior Airport (26 km) and the nearest railway station is Gwalior Junction (35 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gohad Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gohad Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gohad Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Gohad Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gohad Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gohad, Jaitpura Kalan.
